title: rosa × collina subsp. catalaunica
intro: Rosa × collina subsp. catalaunica, also known as the Catalan Rosa, is a subspecies of the Rosa × collina, a hybrid species of wild rose native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to help soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rosa × collina subsp. catalaunica include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Rosa × collina subsp. catalaunica can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health issues.
